description: Hệ thống giám sát toàn diện: Infra, APM, User Access, Database, Blackbox

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM "AccessLog" WHERE "createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "ip") as cnt FROM "AccessLog" WHERE "createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "ip") as cnt FROM "AccessLog" WHERE "createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
SELECT "ip", COUNT(*) as requests, MAX("createdAt") as last_seen FROM "AccessLog" GROUP BY "ip" ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT "createdAt", "ip", "userAgent", "userId" FROM "AccessLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT "id", "username", "email", "role", "createdAt" FROM "User" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT "id", "title", "authorId", "subredditId", "createdAt" FROM "Post" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 20

title: Hệ Thống Giám Sát Toàn Diện
